75.reason: [The sorting algorithm has a logical flaw: it compares each node with every subsequent node but does not correctly implement bubble sort or any standard sorting algorithm. Also, if `head` is NULL, accessing `head->next` will cause a segmentation fault.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [The sorting algorithm has a logical flaw: it compares each node with every subsequent node but does not correctly implement bubble sort or any standard sorting algorithm. Also, if `head` is NULL, accessing `head->next` will cause a segmentation fault.]

121.reason: [If headResult is NULL (e.g., when both input polynomials are empty), calling sort(headResult) will dereference a null pointer in the loop condition `p->next != NULL`, leading to undefined behavior.]
